offer: For construction foremen managing 5-10 job sites, inconsistent safety compliance causes potential legal penalties. We generate daily job site safety compliance checklists instead of manual checklist creation.
problem: Inconsistent safety compliance across job sites
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction foremen

try_it: Let users try template-based checklist generation for 1-3 items

Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
